rooms.title: Premium Rooms
rooms.desc: Over 200 rooms designed with luxury and full modern amenities.

security.desc: 24/7 security system, surveillance cameras, and in-room safes.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.desc: Professional staff team, assisting customers anytime, anywhere.

experience.title: 5-Star Experience
experience.desc: International class service, bringing a wonderful vacation experience.

item1.name: John Doe
item1.comment: Excellent service! The room was clean, staff was friendly. Will definitely come back.

item2.name: Mary Jane
item2.comment: Beautiful view, delicious food, reasonable price. Very satisfied with the experience here!

item3.name: Robert Smith
item3.comment: Convenient location, near center. Spacious and airy room. Recommend to everyone!

item4.name: Alice Brown
item4.comment: Booked a room for my family through this system, very convenient and fast. 10 points!

policy.title: Accommodation Policies
policy.subtitle: What you need to know before booking

checkin.title: Check-in & Check-out
checkin.desc: Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 12:00. Early or late requests depend on availability and may incur additional fees.

cancel.title: Cancellation Policy
cancel.desc: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in. Late cancellation or no-show may result in a full charge.

payment.title: Payment
payment.desc: Accepts credit cards, debit cards and online payments. Booking is confirmed once payment is completed.

rules.title: House Rules
rules.desc: No smoking in rooms, no pets allowed. Please maintain quiet hours at night to respect other guests.

request.title: Special Requests
request.desc: Note your requests when booking. We will do our best to accommodate but cannot guarantee all requests.

safety.title: Safety & Security
safety.desc: In-room safe, 24/7 security cameras. Guests are responsible for any property damage during their stay.

cta.title: Ready for your next getaway?
cta.subtitle: Book today to receive special offers!

footer.text: © 2026 Hotel Booking Management System — Course Project

booking_page.insufficient_capacity_desc: This room can host up to {{maxGuests}} guests. Your search query is for {{totalGuests}} guests. Please select multiple rooms instead.
booking_page.insufficient_total_capacity: Selected rooms capacity ({{selected}} guests) is less than required ({{required}} guests). Please select more rooms.

booking_page.remaining_guests_needed: Still need {{adults}} adults and {{children}} children. Please select more rooms.
booking_page.mock_room_error: Sample room — please search for real rooms on the system.
booking_page.hint_single_room: Hint: Room {{roomName}} can accommodate up to {{maxGuests}} guests (1 child stays free). You can reduce the number of guests or go back to search and select multiple rooms to fit your group of {{totalGuests}} guests.
booking_page.hint_multiple_rooms: Hint: Total capacity of selected rooms is {{maxGuests}} guests. You can select more rooms or reduce the number of guests to fit the capacity limits (1 child per room stays free).

payment.contact_info_sub: Add information to confirm your reservation
payment.booking_info_sub: Add booking details to confirm your room
payment.special_requests_sub: All special requests are subject to availability and are not guaranteed. Early check-in or airport transfer may incur additional charges
payment.policy_checkin_content: Check-in starts at 14:00 and check-out is before 12:00 noon. Early check-in or late check-out requests are subject to room availability at the time of arrival and may incur extra charges. Special requests such as specific room types, extra beds, or airport transfers will be noted but are not guaranteed and may carry additional fees.
payment.policy_cancel_content: Guests may cancel free of charge within the stipulated period before check-in, usually 24 hours. Late cancellations or no-shows may be charged in full or in part. To secure the reservation, the property may require partial or full pre-payment by credit card, debit card, or online payment. Booking confirmation is only effective once payment is completed.
payment.policy_rules_content: During the stay, guests must comply with the property's general rules including no smoking in rooms, no pets unless permitted, and maintaining quiet hours especially at night to avoid disturbing other guests. Guests are fully responsible for any damage, loss, or breakage to property during their stay and may be charged repair or replacement costs at rates set by the property.
payment.tax_info: Taxes and fees are amounts passed on to the host. For any questions, please contact our support team.
payment.terms_agree: By proceeding to payment, you agree to our
payment.payment_method_sub: Select the payment gateway you want to use
payment.vnpay_desc: Pay via VNPay gateway (ATM, QR, Visa/Master)
payment.vnpay_info: You will be redirected to VNPay to complete your payment. Supports domestic ATM, Visa, Mastercard.
payment.momo_info: You will be redirected to the MoMo app or scan a QR code to complete payment.
payment.terms_text: By paying, you agree to our
payment.success_sub: Your invoice has been sent to your email. The host will confirm within 24 hours.
payment.footer_text: Transaction is encrypted and secure. For any questions, please contact
payment.failed_sub: Your payment could not be processed. Your booking has been cancelled.
payment.failed_reason_default: An error occurred during payment processing.
